Trusted by over  1,000 crypto traders
How to Install

Discover Insights You Can't Find Anywhere Else

More News in Real-Time

Dexiom programmatically gathers trends from Truth, Reddit, X, Telegram and analyzes 200+ crypto sites (Cryptoslate, Cointelegraph etc.) powered by AI. Stay updated for the newest trends!

Determine the Meta Instantly

A unique wordcloud shows the most discussed and the most popular topics to quickly search for trending coins.

Unmatched Speed

Be the first to obtain the most relevant data thanks to private gateways and RPCs.

Community

Share your successful trades and discuss your thoughts with our friendly community.

Our Features Help Crypto Traders Win

Tracker+

The improved tracker collects trends from Twitter, Truth, Reddit, Telegram and also analyzes 200+ crypto sites (CryptoSlate, Cointelegraph, etc.) with AI for high-profile news. Be the first to know

Meta Wordcloud

Use the interactive Wordcloud to identify the hottest and most discussed topics in the memecoin industry

Community

Share your PNL, discuss strategies, make friends and develop your community together with Dexiom.

Activate Dexiom

A video tutorial is available! View
1
Drag the "Activate Advanced Features" button over to your bookmark panel. If you don't see a bookmark panel, press Ctrl+Shift+B to open it.
2
Navigate to Axiom.trade and ensure you're logged in before proceeding.
3
Click the bookmark to activate Dexiom.
4
If it's your first time running Dexiom, pass a security check to make sure the wallet is yours.
5
Enjoy!
Activate Advanced Features

Frequently Asked Questions

How does Dexiom gather its Trend Data?

We use proprietary algorithms that scrape the most discussed topics from Reddit, X, Telegram and more than 200 other sites with news about cryptocurrency, while removing one hit wonders and insiders.

How do I get started using Dexiom to improve my DEX trading process?

Simply install the tool to your bookmarks and you can leverage our data to spot emerging opportunities, catalysts and trends.

Is Dexiom free?

This product is made with heart and love from the Axiom team, access for each user is completely free and open.

Level Up Your Crypto Game Today
